title: Dr Simarjeet Singh: Overview, Role, and Research Interests
text:
Dr Simarjeet Singh PhD
Dr. Simarjeet Singh is a finance academician with strong expertise in behavioural finance, investment strategies, and applied financial education.
Role: Assistant Professor
Research Interests: AI and finance Behavioural finance Factor investing Personal finance
Department: Accounting and Finance academics
summary: Dr. Simarjeet Singh is a finance academic with expertise in behavioural finance, investment strategies, and applied financial education.

text: Dr Simarjeet Singh is a faculty member at University of Southampton Delhi.
